title: PipelineSteering not surfacing koe-RumA and H-Ai-Nikr-Agi in agent recommendations
description: PipelineSteering's Invoke-PipelineSteer DryRun output should include agent health status for koe-RumA and H-Ai-Nikr-Agi (e.g., 'koe-RumA: milestone event overdue', 'H-Ai-Nikr-Agi: squabble log unrotated'). Currently these agents are not registered in any AgentRegistry entry and are invisible to PipelineSteer recommendations. Register both agents in sovereign-kernel/core/AgentRegistry.psm1 and add health-check hooks to PipelineSteering that query their status.
notes: AgentRegistry is the module binding authority (sovereign-kernel architecture). Register with: id, displayName, modulePath, healthCheckFunction, lastHealthCheck fields.
